meta.title: Veritas Forensic Law
meta.tagline: Forensic legal expertise where evidence meets advocacy
meta.description: Veritas Forensic Law is a specialist forensic legal practice delivering forensic accounting, digital evidence analysis, expert testimony and litigation support.

home.heroSubtitle: We combine rigorous forensic investigation with courtroom-tested legal strategy — uncovering the facts that decide complex disputes.
home.trustTitle: Trusted by counsel, courts and corporations
home.servicesSubtitle: Four disciplines, one standard of evidentiary rigor.
home.credentialsSubtitle: Our work meets the standards relied upon by courts and regulators.

credentials.bar: Members of the State & Federal Bar

home.finalCtaTitle: Have a matter that turns on the facts?
home.finalCtaSubtitle: Schedule a confidential consultation with our forensic legal team.

forensicAccounting.title: Forensic Accounting
forensicAccounting.summary: Tracing funds, quantifying damages and exposing financial irregularities.
forensicAccounting.detail: Our forensic accountants reconstruct financial records, trace asset movement, quantify economic damages and prepare schedules that withstand cross-examination. Engagements include fraud quantification, business valuation disputes and post-acquisition disputes.

digitalForensics.title: Digital Forensics
digitalForensics.summary: Defensible recovery and analysis of electronic evidence.
digitalForensics.detail: We acquire, preserve and analyse electronic evidence following ISO/IEC 27037 chain-of-custody standards. From deleted-file recovery to metadata and communications analysis, our reports are built to be admissible and clearly explained to a non-technical tribunal.

expertTestimony.title: Expert Testimony
expertTestimony.summary: Clear, credible expert witnesses for deposition and trial.
expertTestimony.detail: Our credentialed experts deliver written reports and live testimony that translate complex findings into clear, defensible conclusions. We prepare for Daubert challenges and present with the composure that persuades judges and juries.

litigationSupport.title: Litigation Support
litigationSupport.summary: E-discovery, evidence management and trial strategy.
litigationSupport.detail: We support counsel end-to-end: e-discovery and document review, evidence management, demonstratives, and the analytical strategy that turns a mountain of data into a focused, winning narrative.

about.title: Forensic rigor, in service of the truth
about.intro: Veritas Forensic Law sits at the intersection of law, accounting and digital science. We are retained by litigators, in-house counsel, regulators and corporations when the outcome of a matter depends on what the evidence really shows.
about.missionBody: Every engagement starts with the evidence. We investigate methodically, document defensibly, and communicate our findings with absolute clarity — because an expert conclusion is only as valuable as a tribunal's confidence in it.

values.independenceBody: Our duty is to the evidence and the court, not to a predetermined conclusion.
values.rigorBody: Methodical, documented procedures that survive the toughest scrutiny.
values.clarityBody: Complex findings explained so any decision-maker can follow them.
values.confidentialityBody: Discreet handling of sensitive matters and privileged material.

about.ctaTitle: Discuss your matter with our team
